data.title: ORCA hit 2.9 USDT in the short term, up more than 60% in 24 hours
data.description: Bitget market data shows that affected by the listing on Upbit, ORCA short-term touched 2.9 USDT and was temporarily reported at 2.616 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 62%.

data.title: Eminem's Former Recording Engineer Faces Legal Consequences for Bitcoin Sales
data.description: According to Foresight News, Joseph Strange, who previously worked as a recording engineer for renowned U.S. rapper Eminem, has been accused of illegally selling 25 unreleased tracks of the artist using Bitcoin. The transactions reportedly earned him approximately $50,000. Strange, who served as Eminem's recording engineer from 2007 to 2021, now faces potential legal repercussions, including a maximum prison sentence of five years and fines up to $250,000.

data.title: Berachain Foundation: PoL will be launched on March 24, and governance will enter the first phase
data.description: The Berachain Foundation announced that PoL (Proof of Liquidity) will be officially launched on March 24, governance will enter the first phase, the incentive mechanism will take effect, and the new reward pool will be discharged. This change means that BGT holders will have more control and profit opportunities, will determine the direction of incentives, and support the allocation of incentives for users, applications, and validators.

data.title: GT's market value ranks among the top 40 cryptocurrencies, currently priced at $22.611
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Market data shows that the market value of Gate.io platform currency GT has reached 2.783 billion US dollars, ranking among the top 40 cryptocurrency market value list. Currently, GT is quoted at 22.611 US dollars.

data.title: Upbit announces the launch of Orca (ORCA)
data.description: Upbit announced that it will launch Orca (ORCA) KRW, BTC, and USDT trading pairs.

data.title: AscendEX will list Bedrock (BR)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) announced that it has launched Bedrock (BR) at 12:30 on March 21, opened the BR/USDT trading pair, and is now open for recharge.

data.title: LBank has launched BUBB U-margin perpetual contract, supporting 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LBank announced that it has launched the BUBB U-based perpetual contract for the first time at 11:30 (SGT) on March 21, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 50 times.

data.title: TRX Price to Rally? Justin Sun’s New Incentives to Boost Meme Coin Trading
data.description:
TRON TRX price may be on the verge of a rally following a bold new move by founder Justin Sun. Sun recently announced on his X account a package of incentives designed to jump-start activity in TRON’s meme coin ecosystem..
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/trx-price-to-rally-justin-suns-new-incentives-to-boost-meme-coin-trading/

data.title: Greeks.live: As quarterly delivery approaches, crypto options market makers bet that the short-term market will continue to consolidate
data.description: Greeks.live macro analyst Adam wrote that this week's crypto market transactions were relatively flat, the total amount of option delivery fell by nearly half, the short-term implied volatility dropped significantly, the short-term volatility of Bitcoin fell below 50%, and the short-term volatility of ETH fell back to around 60%. Cryptocurrencies are currently in a free oscillation sideways state, and investor sentiment is becoming sluggish. As the quarterly delivery approaches, large investors generally adopt a prudent strategy, and option market makers have re-increased their selling intensity, tightened implied volatility, and bet that the short-term market will continue to consolidate.

data.title: The number of active addresses on the Monad test network is approaching 35 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On-chain data shows that the number of active addresses on the Monad test network has reached nearly 35 million (34,466,675) so far.
Earlier, Monad co-founder Keone Hon said yesterday that the test network has resumed operation. In addition, the network has added 15 nodes, bringing the total number of nodes to 72. A few nodes are still not online, but should be restored soon. The team is working hard to improve the robustness of the network upgrade.
